problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monoclonal. Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
